creator: cvs-src@yandex.ru
text:
> ImportError: /usr/local/lib/python2.7/site-packages/_sqlite3.so: Undefined symbol "sqlite3_load_extension"

Please rebuild your databases/sqlite3 with EXTENSION option, after that
rebuild your databases/py-sqlite3. Now all should be fine.

-- 
Regards,
Ruslan

Tinderboxing kills... the drives.
